subcodes.first_line: Verily, We desire to mention and recite that which We revealed unto Muhammad, the Messenger of God... In truth I say, should a soul arise, purely for the sake of God, to promote the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نحب ان نذکر و نقرء ما انزلناه علی محمد رسول الله... براستی میگویم اگر نفسی فی‌الحقیقه لوجه الله بر تبلیغ امر قیام نماید
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God
